title: RBI Introduces Forex Swap Facility to Support PSU ECBs & Overseas Foreign Currency Borrowings
description:
RBI has launched a US Dollar-Rupee swap facility for eligible PSU external commercial borrowings and overseas foreign currency borrowings. The scheme enables banks to hedge qualifying inflows through RBI at a fixed swap cost.
The post RBI Introduces Forex Swap Facility to Support PSU ECBs & Overseas Foreign Currency Borrowings appeared first on TaxGuru.
